title: CaseOh_ Warden
description: This resource pack changes the Warden to look like CaseOh_
body:
# About
This resource pack retextures the Warden to look like the famous Twitch streamer CaseOh_. Now he can roar when enraged, sniff for food, and guard the Deep Dark. This pack also features retextured deep dark blocks, specific music tracks, items, etc. **No EMF/ETF and Optifine required.**

## Disclaimer
- This pack is only meant for pranks and fun alike. Do not make fun of CaseOh_ in real life.
- Although this resource pack requires 1.21.11 to work, it should work on older versions until 1.21.4.
- If you are using my resource pack in a video or a livestream, make sure to give credit to me.

## Upcoming Additions:
- Upcoming textures: Sculk blocks, Sonic Blast, Deepslate variants, etc.
- Upcoming Sounds/Music: Custom Warden sounds, Soundtracks, and new music disc

## FAQ
1. Can I use some of your textures in my own resource pack?
Unless you give me credit, I will be glad.

2. Can I post this resource pack to CaseOh_?
Not yet. This pack may update over time, so if you post an older version to anyone, it would look unsatisfying.

3. Can I donate money for this pack?
No, sorry.

4. How long will the updates take?
Depending on how much time I take to complete it...

5. Does the pack support PBR textures or specific mods?
No, only vanilla textures. No mods required, as specified at the top.

6. Can I edit your pack?
Without permission granted, absolutely not!

# Teaser
